testcase.name: Home Page Navigation › should open catalog on Add Items click
testcase.error:
[chromium] › navigation.spec.ts:26:7 › Home Page Navigation › should open catalog on Add Items click
TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="mobile-fab"]') to be visible
at ..\pages\HomePage.ts:76
74 | } catch (e) { 75 | // Fallback to mobile FAB > 76 | await this.mobileFab.waitFor({ state: 'visible', timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 77 | await this.mobileFab.click(); 78 | } 79 | } at HomePage.clickAddItems (D:\grocery-list\tests\pages\HomePage.ts:76:28) at D:\grocery-list\tests\e2e\navigation.spec.ts:27:5
